title: Safety Scan
instruction: Select all unsafe hazards and confirm PPE before entering the lab.

title: Matter Sort
instruction: Sort items into solid, liquid, and gas.

title: pH Test
instruction: Dip the pH strip and match the colour to the chart.

title: Filtration
instruction: Place the mixture, filter paper, and beaker in the correct order.

title: Microscope Focus
instruction: Adjust focus until the cell image is sharp.

title: Circuit Builder
instruction: Connect battery, wire, switch, and bulb to complete the circuit.

title: Magnet Sorter
instruction: Move magnetic materials to the magnet side.

title: Climate Data Lab
instruction: Read the data and identify the long-term climate pattern.

title: Science Fair
instruction: Use the notebook, run the final simulation, and answer the debrief.
